personalisation.template_context: HumTech offers a done-for-you AI Revenue Engine for insurance brokerages — AI booking bot that converts quote requests into booked consultations, speed-to-lead automation so no enquiry goes cold (critical in insurance where the first broker to respond wins the policy), sales process improvement for account executives, and full ad management. They only get paid when revenue goes up.

sector_hints.reference_outcome: converting quote requests into bound policies
